Off Calendar Sep-18-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT PRE-PAID LEGAL SERVICES INC. DBA LEGALSHIELD's Motion To Compel Binding Contractual Arbitration And For Mandatory Stay Of Case.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Defendant Pre-Paid Legal Services, Inc.'s unopposed "motion to compel binding contractual arbitration and for mandatory stay of case" is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com. (302/RBU)
